---
title: ""
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
    theme: none
    css: CV-styles.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-page">

<div class="header">
    <div class="name">Ramesh <strong>Dulal</strong></div>
    <div class="contact">
        <a href="mailto:ramesh.dulal@ou.edu">ramesh.dulal@ou.edu</a> |
        (405)-326-5305 |
        <a href="https://ramesh-dulal.github.io">ramesh-dulal.github.io</a> |
        <a href="https://github.com/Dulal-Ramesh">GitHub</a> |
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/ramesh-dulal">LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
</div>

<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Ph.D. in Economics</span>
        <span class="entry-location">University of Oklahoma, USA</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">2022 – Present</div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">M.A. in Economics</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Tribhuvan University, Nepal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">2010 – 2012</div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">B.A. in Economics <span class="amp">&</span> Sociology</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Purbanchal University, Nepal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">2003 – 2006</div>
</div>

<h2>Experience</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Graduate Teaching Assistant</span>
        <span class="entry-location">University of Oklahoma, USA</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">2022 – Present</div>
    <ul>
        <li>Principles of Macroeconomics (ECON 1113) — Aug 2023 to May 2024</li>
        <li>Principles of Microeconomics (ECON 1123) — Aug 2022 to May 2023</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Assistant Professor</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Tribhuvan University, Nepal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">2017 – 2022</div>
    <ul>
        <li>Microeconomics (ECON 421), Mathematics <span class="amp">&</span> Statistics for Economics (ECON 422)</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Graduate Instructor</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Goldengate International College, Nepal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">Apr 2019 – Jun 2022</div>
    <ul>
        <li>Microeconomics-I <span class="amp">&</span> II (ECON 551, 555), Monetary Economics (ECON 559)</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<h2>Publications</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <span class="entry-title">"Do Remittances Improve Nutritional Take-Up? Analysis of Child Nutrition in Nepal"</span><br>
    <span class="entry-desc"><em>Journal of Development Innovations</em>, 6(1), 69-64. <a href="https://www.karmaquest.org/journal/index.php/journal/issue/view/1">Link</a></span>
</div>

<h2>Conferences <span class="amp">&</span> Presentations</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <div class="entry-left">
            <span class="entry-title">The Ripple Effect: Nepal's 2015 Earthquake and Age at First Birth</span>
            <div class="entry-dates">Oct 2025</div>
        </div>
        <span class="entry-location">Missouri Valley Economic Association<br>62nd Annual Meeting<br>Kansas City, MO</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <div class="entry-left">
            <span class="entry-title">Shaken to the Core: The Effect of Nepal's 2015 Earthquake on Infant Death</span>
            <div class="entry-dates">Mar 2025</div>
        </div>
        <span class="entry-location">Midwest Economics Association<br>89th Annual Meeting<br>Kansas City, MO</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <div class="entry-left">
            <span class="entry-title">Heterogeneous Impact of Earthquake on Infant Mortality</span>
            <div class="entry-dates">Oct 2024</div>
        </div>
        <span class="entry-location">Missouri Valley Economic Association<br>61st Annual Meeting<br>Kansas City, MO</span>
    </div>
</div>

<h2>Honors <span class="amp">&</span> Awards</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Kondonassis Award for Research in Development</span>
        <span class="entry-location">University of Oklahoma, USA</span>
    </div>
    <div class="entry-dates">2024</div>
</div>

<h2>Trainings</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Summer School in Environmental and Resource Economics</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Bangkok, Thailand — May 2019</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Advanced Course on Program Evaluation (SANDEE)</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Kathmandu, Nepal — Dec 2018</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">CGE Modelling Training Program (SAWTEE)</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Pokhara, Nepal — Aug 2018</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Applied Econometrics for Practitioners (World Bank)</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Kathmandu, Nepal — Jan–Mar 2018</span>
    </div>
</div>

<h2>Service</h2>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Senator, Graduate Student Senate (Ways and Means Committee)</span>
        <span class="entry-location">University of Oklahoma — 2023–Present</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="entry">
    <div class="entry-line">
        <span class="entry-title">Member, Tribhuvan University Teacher's Association</span>
        <span class="entry-location">Tribhuvan University — 2017–2022</span>
    </div>
</div>

<h2>Skills</h2>

<div class="skills-row">
    <div class="skills-item"><strong>Coding:</strong> STATA, <span class="latex">L<sup>A</sup>T<sub>E</sub>X</span>, R</div>
    <div class="skills-item"><strong>Languages:</strong> English, Nepali, Hindi</div>
</div>

<div class="footer">
    Last Updated: {{< meta date >}}
</div>

</div> <!-- end .cv-page -->
```
